data.name: HelpHeader
data.value: Renamer CLI

data.name: HelpCommandsLabel
data.value: Available commands:

data.name: HelpCommandHelp
data.value: help Show this help.

data.name: HelpCommandPlan
data.value: plan --root <path> --out <path>

data.name: HelpCommandApply
data.value: apply --plan <path> --out <path>

data.name: PlanErrorMissingArgs
data.value: Error: Missing required arguments for 'plan'. Expected --root <path> and --out <path>.

data.name: PlanErrorRootNotFound
data.value: Root path '{0}' does not exist or is not a directory.

data.name: PlanErrorOutputIsDirectory
data.value: Output path '{0}' must be a file path, not a directory.

data.name: PlanErrorOutputNotWritable
data.value: Output path '{0}' is not writable. Check the application log for details.

data.name: PlanErrorBuildFileSystem
data.value: Plan generation failed due to a file system error. Check the application log for details.

data.name: PlanErrorBuildUnexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during plan generation. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorMissingArgs
data.value: Error: Missing required arguments for 'apply'. Expected --plan <path> and --out <path>.

data.name: ApplyErrorPlanNotFound
data.value: Plan path '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: ApplyErrorPlanNotReadable
data.value: Plan path '{0}' is not readable. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorInvalidSchema
data.value: The plan artifact uses an unsupported format or schema. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorReadFileSystem
data.value: A file system error prevented the plan from being read. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorOutputIsDirectory
data.value: Output path '{0}' must be a file path, not a directory.

data.name: ApplyErrorOutputNotWritable
data.value: Output path '{0}' is not writable. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorEngineFileSystem
data.value: A file system error prevented apply from completing. Check the application log for details.

data.name: ApplyErrorEngineUnexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred during apply. Check the application log for details.
